---
title: "About Me"
---

## Hi, I'm Jasper

I'm a [your role/profession] based in [your city]. I work on [brief summary of your work — e.g., "data systems, policy research, and open-source tools"]. Before that, I [brief prior experience].

My interests sit at the intersection of [interest 1], [interest 2], and [interest 3]. I'm particularly drawn to questions about [a theme you care about].

When I'm not working you'll find me [hobby/interest].

---

## Work

**[Current Role]** · [Company/Organisation] · *[Year]–present*
[One-sentence description of what you do here.]

**[Previous Role]** · [Company/Organisation] · *[Year]–[Year]*
[One-sentence description.]

---

## Elsewhere

::: {.about-links}
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[GitHub](https://github.com/JasperCain01){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[Email](mailto:your@email.com){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
